rule_text: All AP work done otherwise than by daily labour AND all supplies relating to a work must be paid for ON THE BASIS OF MEASUREMENTS recorded in a Measurement Book (Common Form 298); the Measurement Book is the original record of actual measurement/count, must be kept with great care since it may be produced as evidence in court.
verification_method: Check tender SCC: payment-from-measurement-book clause; verify book maintenance protocol

rule_text: NO ADVANCE shall be paid to a contractor in AP works EXCEPT with the SPECIAL SANCTION of the Government or competent delegated authority; Government servants must maintain a system under which payment is made ONLY for work actually done.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND AdvancePayment=true
verification_method: Any contractor advance: check special sanction order with delegation authority; reject open-ended advance clauses

rule_text: When an AP contractor anticipates a contract will result in a NET LOSS to him, this is NOT to be accepted as a reason for not compelling him to complete the work; the contractor has no claim to leniency when execution turns out less favourable than originally anticipated.
verification_method: Tender SCC must NOT include cost-overrun-relief clauses for contractor's misjudgement; reject loss-contingency reduction provisions

rule_text: Every completed AP work requires a COMPLETION REPORT showing: name of work, sanction order number/date, sanctioned expenditure, actual expenditure; if actual exceeds sanctioned, completion report must include reasons and obtain authority's sanction for excess.
verification_method: Check completed-work file contains completion report on Common Form 296 with all four data points + excess-justification if applicable
